args.code: (()=>{try{const g=window.game||{};const ls=localStorage;const save=JSON.parse(ls.getItem('farm_game_save')||'{}');const saveV1=JSON.parse(ls.getItem('farm_game_save_v1')||'{}');const d=saveV1.version?saveV1:save;const npcs=Array.isArray(d.npcs)?d.npcs:(d.npcData?Object.values(d.npcData):[]);const maxNpc=npcs.length>0?Math.max(...npcs.map(n=>n.friendship||0)):'无';const maxNpcName=npcs.length>0?npcs.find(n=>n.friendship===Math.max(...npcs.map(x=>x.friendship||0)))?.name||'':'无';const fields=Array.isArray(d.fields)?d.fields:[];const crops=fields.map(f=>{const c=f.crop||f.cropType||'无';const s=f.status||f.cropStatus||'idle';const st=f.stage||f.growthStage||0;const days=f.remainingDays??f.daysLeft??'??';return c+'('+s+(st!==undefined?':st'+st:'')+(days!==undefined?':'+days:'')+')';}).join('+');const w=d.weather?{name:d.weather.name||d.weather,rem:d.weather.remainingDays||d.weatherDuration||d.weatherRemaining||'-'}:{};const events=Array.isArray(d.events)?d.events.length:(Array.isArray(d.activeEvents)?d.activeEvents.length:(Array.isArray(d.eventHistory)?d.eventHistory.length:0));const skills=Array.isArray(d.skills)?d.skills.map(s=>s.name+'L'+(s.level||0)).join('+'):((d.skills?Object.entries(d.skills).map(([k,v])=>k+(v.level||v||0)).join('+'):'无'));const petNames=Array.isArray(d.pets)?d.pets.map(p=>p.name||p.type||'').join('+'):(d.pets?Object.values(d.pets).map(p=>p.name||p.type||'').join('+'):'无');const milestoneCount=Array.isArray(d.milestones)?d.milestones.length:(d.milestoneCount||0);const questCount=Array.isArray(d.quests)?d.quests.length:(d.questData?Object.keys(d.questData).length:(d.questCount||0));const unlockedTabs=d.unlockedTabs||d.tabs||d.unlocked||[];return JSON.stringify({ok:true,day:d.day||d.currentDay||0,totalDay:d.totalDay||d.daysPlayed||d.totalDays||0,season:d.season||d.currentSeason||'-',weather:w.name||'-',weatherRem:w.rem||'-',money:d.money||d.gold||d.cash||0,stamina:d.stamina||d.playerStamina||0,maxStamina:d.maxStamina||d.staminaCap||100,health:d.health||d.playerHealth||0,maxHealth:d.maxHealth||d.healthCap||100,fieldsCount:fields.length,fieldTotal:d.fieldCount||d.totalFields||fields.length,fieldStatus:crops||'无',eventsCount:events,skillsTotalLevel:Array.isArray(d.skills)?d.skills.reduce((a,s)=>a+(s.level||0),0):0,skillsText:skills,maxNpcFriendship:maxNpc,maxNpcName:maxNpcName,reputation:d.reputation||d.fame||0,mood:d.mood||d.playerMood||d.happiness||0,mode:d.mode||d.gameMode||d.difficulty||'-',house:d.house||d.housing||d.home||'-',research:d.researchPoints||d.research||0,storageCap:d.storageCapacity||d.storageCap||d.warehouseCap||0,totalHarvest:d.totalHarvest||d.harvestCount||0,totalSales:d.totalSales||d.sales||0,milestones:milestoneCount,questCount:questCount,petNames:petNames,disasterRate:d.disasterRate||d.disasterChance||1,gameSpeed:d.speed||d.gameSpeed||d.timeMultiplier||1,saveSize:JSON.stringify(d).length,saveVersion:d.version||d.saveVersion||'-',unlockedTabsCount:Array.isArray(unlockedTabs)?unlockedTabs.length:0,saveExists:!!(ls.getItem('farm_game_save')||ls.getItem('farm_game_save_v1')),gameLoopRunning:typeof window.gameLoop!=='undefined'||typeof window.startGameLoop!=='undefined'})}catch(e){return JSON.stringify({ok:false,error:e.message})}})()
